gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewer Galileo approved the branch as clean with no findings after checking config wiring, command ordering, CLI behavior, bundle auto-inclusion, docs, and tests.
verification: poetry run pytest -q tests/test_benchmark_plan.py tests/test_release_evidence.py tests/test_release_bundle.py tests/test_project_governance.py tests/test_public_package.py
poetry run python -m compileall -q src tests
what_changed: Benchmark plans can now generate a release-evidence preflight sidecar with --release-preflight-output-json and bundle that generated sidecar automatically.
why: Release bundles should be reproducible from the generated command plan without requiring a manually supplied release-input preflight JSON sidecar.
